AMI’s MegaRAC® delivers industry-leading Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) firmware that powers the world’s most advanced Data Center platforms, Edge devices and AI infrastructure. With decades of innovation and a commitment to open standards, AMI enables OEMs, ODMs and cloud service providers to build secure, scalable and resilient systems with unmatched control and visibility.

MegaRAC OneTree™ is AMI’s next-generation BMC firmware designed to optimize platform development and management by consolidating support for Intel, AMD, NVIDIA, Ampere, ASPEED, Nuvoton and other silicon solutions into a single codebase. Built on the open architecture of OpenBMC and delivering rich BMC features such as Redfish, PLDM, MCTP, RAS and telemetry, MegaRAC OneTree enables consistent integration of critical capabilities across heterogeneous environments. It also simplifies development, accelerates time-to-market and reduces validation overhead for engineering teams.

AMI’s AI Infrastructure Management solutions address the unique challenges of modern computing environments, including accelerator management, rack-scale orchestration, liquid cooling control, power shelf optimization and CXL device management. Leveraging MegaRAC OneTree core firmware stack and advanced IPs, these solutions provide vendor-agnostic multi-device support, granular telemetry, policy-based automation and real-time fault detection across heterogeneous hardware.

MegaRAC SP-X™ is AMI’s mature and widely deployed BMC firmware solution, trusted by top-tier ODMs, OEMs and hyperscalers. Built on a robust architecture with support for standard interfaces and advanced management features, SP-X provides comprehensive out-of-band management for servers, accelerators and storage systems. Its modular design, tools and extensive silicon support make it ideal for production environments requiring stability, scalability and compliance with evolving industry standards.

The MegaRAC Development Kit for the AST2600 BMC features hardware, tutorials and access to MegaRAC firmware to help developers and engineers gain experience in sensor porting, management technologies such as Serial Over LAN (SOL) and UART and virtual media (vMedia). This kit allows customers to begin immediate development and training projects using the MegaRAC Community Edition™ BMC Firmware with the AST2600 BMC from ASPEED Technology.

_module_preset=”default” text_font=”Aptos||||||||” text_text_color=”#FFFFFF” text_line_height=”1.5em” text_orientation=”center” width=”60%” width_tablet=”95%” width_phone=”90%” width_last_edited=”on|phone” module_alignment=”center” custom_margin=”10px||10px||true|false” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Partner with AMI to unlock the full potential of your infrastructure. From silicon to system to datacenter orchestration, our MegaRAC solutions deliver the control, security and scalability you need to lead in today’s AI-driven world.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI0MDQwNSJ9fQ==@” button_text=”Contact Us” button_alignment=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_url” _module_preset=”default” custom_button=”on” button_text_size=”15px” button_text_color=”#FFFFFF” button_border_width=”1px” button_border_color=”#FFFFFF” button_border_radius=”50px” button_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” button_use_icon=”off” custom_margin=”20px||0px||false|false” custom_padding=”10px|50px|10px|50px|true|true” global_colors_info=”{}” button_bg_color__hover_enabled=”on|desktop” button_bg_color__hover=”#FFFFFF” button_bg_enable_color__hover=”on” button_text_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_text_color__hover=”#000000″ button_border_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_border_color__hover=”#FFFFFF”][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]

excerpt.rendered: Empowering Intelligent Infrastructure: Scalable Manageability from Edge to CloudAMI’s MegaRAC® delivers industry-leading Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) firmware that powers the world’s most advanced Data Center platforms, Edge devices and AI infrastructure. With decades of innovation and a commitment to open standards, AMI enables OEMs, ODMs and cloud service providers to build secure, scalable and resilient […]
